name: Honey Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup water to soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
2. Pour slowly over stiffly beaten egg whites, beating constantly until stiff.
3. Boil together the remaining 3 cups sugar, honey, peanut butter, and 1/2 cup water to soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
4. Slowly add the boiled mixture to the stiff egg white mixture. Beat constantly until the mixture will hold its shape when dropped from a teaspoon.
5. Add nuts and vanilla flavoring.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
